summary: Ukrainian FPV drone operators are inflicting heavy losses on Russian forces north of the Dobropillia line, littering roads and groves with hundreds of destroyed armored vehicles, cars, and engineering equipment. Belarusian volunteer FPV crews from unit 1514 within HUR’s “Timur” special unit have struck Russian targets on the Zaporizhzhia axis. Russian forces have adopted and scaled Ukraine’s “Drone Line” tactics, as analyzed by FPRI’s Rob Lee and Ukrainian serviceman Dmitry Putyata. The “Rubicon” Center reported a new daily record of 234 targets destroyed on April 21, 2026, including personnel, fixed-wing UAVs, and armored vehicles across multiple fronts. Ukrainian forces also destroyed a Russian TOS-1A MLRS using a combination of Bulava loitering munitions and FPV drones, and repelled motorcycle-mounted assaults with FPV strikes.
